            <script type="text/javascript">
                (function() {
                    try {
                        console.log('埋点脚本开始执行');
                        var queryObj = {
                            appid: 2570,
                            // 业务方appid, 数值型
                            sid: window.sessionStorage.getItem('uuid_sid') ?? '',
                            data: JSON.stringify({
                                evt: 'html_view',
                                lang: (navigator.language || '').toLowerCase(),
                                eparam: {
                                    k1: 'v1',
                                    projectId: 'film-tv-news'
                                },
                                uts: Date.now(),
                                tz: 'UTC+' + ('0' + (0 - new Date().getTimezoneOffset() / 60)).substr(-2)
                            })
                        };

                        var queryStr = Object.keys(queryObj).map(function(key) {
                            var val = queryObj[key];
                            if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '')
                                return '';
                            return encodeURIComponent(key) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(val);
                        }).filter(function(s) {
                            return s;
                        }).join('&');

                        var isProd = "prod" === 'prod';
                        var originalImgRe = isProd ? 'https://dsu-h5-mb.shallspark.com' : 'https://dsu-h-test.shallspark.com';
                        window.imgRe = function() {
                            try {
                                var img = new Image();
                                img.src = originalImgRe + '/athena/tracking/v1/athena_h5/loading.gif?' + queryStr;
                            } catch (e) {}
                        }
                        ;
                        // 立即发送一次加载埋点
                        window.imgRe();
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.error('埋点脚本异常', e);
                    }
                }
                )();
            </script>
